case.label: happy_path_refund
case.message: Hi, I ordered headphones last week. They arrived broken. I want a refund. Order ID: ORD-1007.

workflow.customer_response: Thanks for reaching out — I've pulled up your order. If the item arrived damaged, you're covered: I'll have a teammate confirm the refund and send you a return label by email.
workflow.reasoning_summary: Workflow path: classify → retrieve → draft → safety_check (needs_human=False).

agent.customer_response: Thanks for letting us know. Damaged-on-arrival items are eligible for return regardless of category. A teammate will confirm the refund and email you a prepaid return label.
agent.reasoning_summary: Damaged item: eligible per policy, refund needs human approval.

case.label: missing_information
case.message: My package never arrived and I need this fixed ASAP.

workflow.customer_response: Thank you for reaching out. I want to make sure you get the right help here, so I've flagged this for a teammate — they'll follow up with you shortly. We're sorry for the inconvenience.
workflow.reasoning_summary: Workflow path: classify → retrieve → draft → safety_check (needs_human=True).

agent.customer_response: I'm sorry your package hasn't arrived. To investigate, could you share the order ID and the email used at checkout? Once I have those I'll pull the latest tracking and next steps.
agent.reasoning_summary: Asked for missing order ID; no tools could resolve without it.

case.label: multi_intent
case.message: I was charged twice, and the item also arrived damaged.

workflow.customer_response: Thank you for reaching out. I want to make sure you get the right help here, so I've flagged this for a teammate — they'll follow up with you shortly. We're sorry for the inconvenience.
workflow.reasoning_summary: Workflow path: classify → retrieve → draft → safety_check (needs_human=True).

agent.customer_response: Thank you for flagging this. Duplicate charges have to be reviewed by our billing team; a teammate will reach out shortly.

case.label: policy_edge_case
case.message: I bought this as a gift, it arrived late, and now the return window may be over. Can you help?

workflow.customer_response: Thanks for reaching out — I've pulled up your order. If the item arrived damaged, you're covered: I'll have a teammate confirm the refund and send you a return label by email.

agent.customer_response: Thanks for reaching out! Could you share a bit more about what you'd like help with — an order ID, or the specific question you have?
agent.reasoning_summary: No clear intent; asked for clarification.

case.label: high_risk_escalation
case.message: I'm furious. I was charged twice and I'm considering legal action.

workflow.customer_response: Thank you for reaching out. I want to make sure you get the right help here, so I've flagged this for a teammate — they'll follow up with you shortly. We're sorry for the inconvenience.
workflow.reasoning_summary: Workflow path: classify → retrieve → draft → safety_check (needs_human=True).

agent.customer_response: I'm sorry for the frustration. Because of the seriousness of what you've described, a human teammate from our team will follow up with you within one business day.
